case_title: CCSF- TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. HEATHER FECTEAU

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH SARAH HEYWORTH (TITLE: SR. COLLECTION OFFICER). NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
